  1. recoder.java
  2. NonTerminalProgramElement

Uses of Interface
recoder.java.NonTerminalProgramElement

Packages that use NonTerminalProgramElement
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.adt
This package contains RecodeR Operators which represent algebraic data type functions.
recoder.convenience
The convenience layer contains auxiliary functions that are useful in the context of RECODER.
recoder.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
recoder.java.declaration
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing declarations.
recoder.java.expression
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing expressions.
recoder.java.expression.literal
This package contains representations for the various Java literal types.
recoder.java.expression.operator
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing operators and operator-like expressions.
recoder.java.reference
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing implicit or explicit (named) references to other program elements.
recoder.java.statement
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing pure statements.
recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework.
recoder.kit.transformation
This package contains transformation command objects and associated problem reports.
recoder.kit.transformation.java5to4
Contains transformations which attempt to make a java5 project compilable with -source 1.4 compiler switch and which can be used by a java 1.4 runtime environment.
recoder.service
This package contains the semantical services of RECODER.

  • Uses of NonTerminalProgramElement in de.uka.ilkd.key.java

    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.java with parameters of type NonTerminalProgramElement
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected ExtList
    Recoder2KeYConverter.collectChildren(NonTerminalProgramElement pe)
    iterate over all children and call convert upon them.

    ASTIteratorListener.enterChildren(ASTIterator it, NonTerminalProgramElement thisNode)

    void

    Called immediately after the iterator returned from the child node.

    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    Declaration
    Declaration.
    interface 
    ExpressionContainer
    Expression container.
    interface 
    NamedProgramElement
    Named program element.
    interface 
    ParameterContainer
    Describes program elements that contain ParameterDeclarations.
    interface 
    ScopeDefiningElement
    The property of a non terminal program element to define a scope.
    interface 
    StatementContainer
    Statement container.
    interface 
    TypeScope
    The property of a non terminal program element to define a scope for types.
    interface 
    VariableScope
    The property of a non terminal program element to define a scope for variables.

    Methods in recoder.kit with parameters of type NonTerminalProgramElement
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static boolean
    MiscKit.contains(NonTerminalProgramElement root, ProgramElement node)
    Query checking if a given non terminal is identical to or an ancestor of the given node.
    static List<TypeReference>
    TypeKit.getInfluencedReferences(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xr, String newTypeName, NonTerminalProgramElement context)
    Deprecated.
    still untested.
    static List<MemberReference>
    MethodKit.getReferences(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xr, Method m, NonTerminalProgramElement root, boolean scanTree)
    Query that retrieves all references to a given method that are contained within the given tree.
    static List<TypeReference>
    TypeKit.getReferences(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xr, Type t, NonTerminalProgramElement root, boolean scanTree)
    Query that retrieves all references to a given type that are contained within the given tree.
    static List<VariableReference>
    VariableKit.getReferences(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xr, Variable v, NonTerminalProgramElement root, boolean scanTree)
    Query that retrieves all references to a given variable that are contained within the given tree.
